_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: Reduction in cell indices over time amounted to about 20% in rat oligodendrocytes (OLN93)...While only 36% of the control-transfected OLN93 cells showed no process, 66% of Merlin overexpressing cells had no projections
details: NF2 overexpression reduced cell proliferation by approximately 20% in XCELLigence measurements and significantly decreased process formation (66% of cells showed no projections vs 36% in controls)
